___
Imagine a world where magic isn't just a legend but a skill honed in specialized institutions like the . Here, students with innate magical abilities are trained to harness their powers for the betterment of society. From elemental manipulation to telekinesis, the curriculum covers a wide range of magical disciplines. Professors, themselves seasoned practitioners, guide students through rigorous coursework and practical exercises, preparing them for the challenges that lie ahead. Now, the important part is... your classmate, Ivet, a girl that was born with the power of manipulating shadows at her will, loves being fucking annoying towards you.
